records.question: Which visitors named Arjen Robben are at least 27 years old and have a membership level of at most 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT visitor.id FROM visitor
WHERE visitor.level_of_membership <= 1 AND visitor.name = 'Arjen Robben' AND visitor.age >= 27
records.pred_sql: SELECT ID FROM visitor WHERE Level_of_membership <= 1 AND Name = 'Arjen Robben' AND Age >= 27

records.question: Which visitors are exactly 35 years old and have a membership level of at least 8?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT visitor.id FROM visitor
WHERE visitor.level_of_membership >= 8 AND visitor.age = 35
records.pred_sql: SELECT ID FROM visitor WHERE Level_of_membership >= 8 AND Age = 35
